tagline: Formerly known as Genie Spaces, Genie Agents provide a natural-language interface for data interaction.
what_it_does: Genie Agents serve as a domain-specific natural-language chat interface within Databricks, allowing users to query their data and receive SQL queries, results tables, and visualizations. Each agent is curated by data analysts using datasets from Unity Catalog, example SQL queries, and tailored instructions to fit organizational terminology. The product's capabilities remain unchanged despite the name change from Genie Spaces.
why_it_matters: The rebranding to Genie Agents enhances clarity and aligns with the product's functionality, making it easier for business users to leverage AI for data exploration. This change supports improved productivity for data analysts and business users by providing a streamlined chat interface for accessing data insights, ultimately driving better decision-making.
plain_summary: Genie Agents serve as a domain specific natural language chat interface within Databricks, allowing users to query their data and receive SQL queries, results tables, and visualizations. Each agent is curated by data analysts using datasets from Unity…

capabilities.title: Natural Language Queries
capabilities.desc: Users can ask questions in natural language and receive structured data responses.

capabilities.title: Curated Data Access
capabilities.desc: Data analysts can curate agents with datasets and SQL queries tailored to business needs.

capabilities.title: Integration with Unity Catalog
capabilities.desc: Genie Agents utilize datasets registered in Unity Catalog for enhanced data governance.

capabilities.title: Embedding in Applications
capabilities.desc: Genie Agents can be embedded into external applications for broader accessibility.

use_cases: Business users exploring data insights through natural language.
Data analysts curating agents for specific business queries.
Embedding Genie Agents into customer-facing applications.

steps.title: Create a Genie Agent
steps.desc: Set up a new Genie Agent and configure it with relevant datasets.

steps.title: Curate Agent Content
steps.desc: Add SQL queries and tailored instructions for user interaction.

steps.title: Test Agent Performance
steps.desc: Run benchmarks and monitor the agent's response quality.

steps.title: Embed in External Apps
steps.desc: Integrate the Genie Agent into other applications as needed.

steps.title: Troubleshoot Issues
steps.desc: Diagnose and resolve any common issues encountered with the agent.

key_takeaway: Genie Spaces have been rebranded to Genie Agents, maintaining their core functionality while enhancing user clarity and engagement.
